fixes.title: PluginContext.Provider value memoized with useMemo
fixes.description: Wrapped the PluginContext.Provider value object in useMemo with a dependency array covering all 11 properties (plugins, commands, statusBarItems, panels, views, and 6 callbacks). Prevents unnecessary re-renders of all consumers when unrelated state changes.

fixes.title: VoiceContext.Provider value memoized with useMemo
fixes.description: Wrapped the VoiceContext.Provider value object in useMemo with a dependency array covering all 15 properties. Prevents re-renders of consumers when unrelated voice state changes (e.g., isListening change no longer re-renders components that only read settings).

fixes.title: AIContext.Provider value memoized with useMemo
fixes.description: Added useMemo import and wrapped the AIContext.Provider value object (25 properties) in useMemo with a complete dependency array. Prevents all AI context consumers from re-rendering on every state change.

fixes.title: TaskItemContent and TaskItemActions wrapped in React.memo
fixes.description: Both sub-components of TaskItem are now wrapped in React.memo. TaskItemContent receives 8 props and TaskItemActions receives 3 props, all of which are stable references from the memoized parent TaskItem. This prevents unnecessary re-renders when sibling state changes (e.g., animClass, showBurst).

fixes.title: Merged duplicate useEffect hooks in TaskItem.tsx
fixes.description: Merged two separate useEffect hooks that both watched task.status into a single effect. The first set animClass and the second set showBurst, both checking the same pending->completed transition. Combined into one effect with two timeouts. Also reordered hook declarations so useState(showBurst) and useReducedMotion() are declared before the effect that uses them.

fixes.title: SettingsContext batch endpoint — TODO comment added
fixes.description: Added a TODO comment documenting the need for a GET /api/settings batch endpoint to replace 52 individual api.getAppSetting() calls. Requires backend changes in src/api/settings.ts and a new api.getAllSettings() frontend helper. Deferred to avoid scope creep.

fixes.title: PluginContext batch API endpoint
fixes.description: Consolidating 5 separate plugin API calls into a single GET /api/plugins/state endpoint requires backend changes. Deferred.

fixes.title: useReducedMotion refactor to dedicated context
fixes.description: Creating a dedicated ReducedMotionContext to avoid full SettingsContext subscription in every TaskItem. Deferred as it requires a broader refactor of the settings selector pattern.

notesOnPreExistingIssues.typecheck: 2 pre-existing errors in lmstudio.ts (missing DEFAULT_LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL) and api/ai.ts (unused ChatMessage import). Not caused by this round's fixes.
notesOnPreExistingIssues.lint: 2 pre-existing errors: unused ChatMessage in src/api/ai.ts and unused ErrorBoundary. 72 warnings. Not caused by this round's fixes.
